title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-e2e
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 57 warnings. Top categories: missing_errors_doc, cast_possible_truncation, map_unwrap_or, similar_names (labels_a_after vs labels_b_after — keep them, allow similar_names for the e2e test specifically), too_many_lines (the round_trip test is intentionally a single linear narrative — allow too_many_lines on that fn with a comment), manual_assert.

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues; only allow specific lints with a one-line justification.
- The submit_then_answer_round_trip integration test must still run unconditionally (no #[ignore]) and pass.
- cargo fmt --check clean.
